page.title: Uploader Console
page.subtitle: Uploader · A_600 / A_601
page.applyDescription: You need the uploader role to register events. It will be activated after admin approval.
page.applyIdNote: Instead of a resident registration number, identity is verified via business registration number for organizations or personal identity verification for individuals (ADR 0003).
page.loginDescription: You can apply for the uploader role and register events after logging in.
page.needSwitchDesc: — Switch to uploader to register events
page.newUploadDesc: Events will be made public after admin approval.
page.editDesc: Reflect admin feedback and resubmit for review.
page.needApproval: Please complete the uploader role application first.
page.notApproved: Uploader approval is not complete. Check your status in the Uploader Console.
page.roleSwitchDesc: The upload form is disabled during normal browsing to prevent accidental uploads. You can continue after switching.
page.roleSwitchEditDesc: The edit form is only active when in uploader role.
page.notEditable: Cannot edit in the current state. Please check the latest status.
page.notEditableStatus: Cannot edit in the current state ({{status}}). Return to the uploader console to check the status.
page.pendingMessage: Admin is reviewing. You can register events once approved.
page.revisionMessage: Admin has requested revisions. Please review your info and reapply.
page.rejectedMessage: Your application was rejected. Please refine your information and reapply.
page.emptyAll: No events registered yet. Start from 'Upload New Event' in the top right.

form.title: Title
form.descriptionHint: Up to 10,000 characters. Keep it fact-based and concise.
form.addressDetailPlaceholder: e.g. Yeouido Hangang Park, Yeongdeungpo-gu, Seoul
form.documentHint: Business registration, permit, employment certificate, etc. JPEG · PNG · PDF, 5MB per file
form.documentRangeHint: Business registration, approval letter, permit, ID, etc. JPEG · PNG · PDF, 5MB per file
form.pendingNote: Events will be made public after admin approval.
form.resubmitNote: Saving will change the status back to 'Pending' and restart admin review.
form.orgNameHint: 2+ characters. e.g. Seoul Festival Planning, Seongsu Local Restaurant Association
form.realNameHint: Legal name of the representative/contact person as on documents
form.emailHint: Used to notify you of admin review results
form.kycDevNote: Dev: random 88-char CI generation stub. In production, automatically swapped with PASS / NICE / Kakao popup flow (lib/identity-verification.ts).
form.kycProdNote: CI is securely stored after verification (only masked display for admin).
form.cooldownMsg: Rejected applications have a {{days}}-day cooldown — please reapply after {{date}}.
form.posterClearMsg: Poster will be removed on save.
form.docsHintReplace: Upload {{min}}–{{max}} new files. Existing documents will be deleted on save.
form.docsHintKeep: Existing documents are kept. Click the button below to replace.
